metadata.title:
IMMERSION


Up SCALE

GET TOGETHER WITH EN-.
PlOYERS ON BASIS OF


$3.50 PER DAY

pages.raw_text:
The report that the local timers
union has signed working agree
ment with practically all the en-
ployers in the city gained circula-
ton yesterday afternoon. The
time of the agreement is for one
year, or until January l, 1911, &C.
cording to the report.


An eight-hour day with mini
mum wage of $3.50 is said to be the
specific provisions of the new
scale. When questioned about the
new scale today, George Bond, the
secretary of the union, said he did
not wish to discuss the agreement
for publication at this time.


The union has recently greatly
Increased in strength, it being re-
ported some time ago that seven of
the local employers had decided to
maintain the closed shop.
